subject: Update nbi deployment to have DMAAP_HOST
commit_message:
Update nbi deployment to have DMAAP_HOST

Change-Id: Ie24091607ae131599ca107a5191a9cd55dc58991
Issue-ID: OOM-1725
Signed-off-by: aosull01 <adrian.osullivan@huawei.com>
